user_query: I am organizing a charity event and I need some help with email marketing. Please provide me with access to the dashboard with all features for email marketing. Additionally, I would like to validate the email addresses of our donors. Please validate the email 'donor1@example.com' and let us know if it is correct.

TaskList.description: Request access to the email marketing dashboard with all features enabled.
Validate the email address 'donor1@example.com' to check if it is correct.
